location: Found on a corpse inside Taylew's Ruined Forge, a dungeon in the northwestern Ancient Ruins of Rauh, past a lava-pit pillar jump and guarded by a magma slime enemy.

source.name: Living Magma / lava slime (guarding the item)

tactics: Reach Taylew's Ruined Forge by heading north/northeast from the Ancient Ruins Base Site of Grace (itself reached via Moorth Ruins and a cave of giant birds).

Inside, descend the stairs and ladder, then drop through the floor gap; a side room here holds a different Smithscript weapon (sources disagree whether it's the Axe or Shield) — don't grab that one by mistake.
Jump onto the large suspended stone pillar over the lava, then jump again to the far ledge and follow the corridor left to a corpse behind broken rubble/a statue — that's the Greathammer.
A lava/magma slime drops from the ceiling near the corpse and can ambush you mid-loot, so clear or dodge it first.
lore: Etched with a smithscript, this greathammer was forged using smithing arts that let it double as a throwing weapon — a strong or dashing strong attack sends it spinning through the air before it flies back to the wielder's hand.

builds.name: Quality Hybrid Caster
builds.why: Its scaling touches Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Faith all at once, so a spellcaster with some Strength invested can still get respectable AR out of it as a melee/ranged backup.

builds.name: Zero-Cost Ranged Strength Build
builds.why: Strong and dashing-strong attacks fling it as a free, FP-less ranged projectile that auto-returns, giving a Strength melee build a poke option without spending FP or a talisman slot.
